curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff which modifies the tenant scoping condition in TenantPermission.addTenantScopeToQuery and ModelPermission.addTenantScopeToQuery. The fix corrects the conditional logic so that when isMultiTenantRequest is true and a tenantId is provided, the query is still properly scoped through user global access permissions instead of falling through without tenant filtering.
